structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-14 Product Department Survey
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-14 13:53:10-07:00

 



 

As a follow up to the announcement earlier this week regarding the new Product Team, please take a moment to complete the below survey.  This should take about 5 minutes, and your feedback will help assist the Product Team with refining our operations.  We look forward to hearing from you!

 

Please click here to complete the survey. <https://forms.office.com/r/P2rhcMRVyF> 

 

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
